name: Circle Shooter Master
description: Circle Shooter Master is a cool and exciting game about destroying the boss in the circle. You run in circles, shoot the boss, get materials, build towers, defend roadblocks and grab things that fall on the circle. You have to watch out for the boss&rsquo;s attack and kill him before he hurts you. Join the game now!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: 3D, Avoid, Boys, Kids, Shoot 'Em Up, weapons
